vocab.meaning_vi: hàn huyên, cập nhật tin tức với ai đó
vocab.example: Let's catch up over coffee before the meeting starts.
vocab.example_vi: Mình hàn huyên chút bên cà phê trước khi họp nhé.

vocab.example: How was your commute this morning? The traffic looked terrible.
vocab.example_vi: Sáng nay đi làm thế nào? Đường có vẻ tắc lắm.

vocab.meaning_vi: kỳ nghỉ cuối tuần dài (dính lễ)
vocab.example: Did you go anywhere for the long weekend?
vocab.example_vi: Cuối tuần dài vừa rồi bạn có đi đâu không?

vocab.example: I'm swamped this week — three deadlines on Friday.
vocab.example_vi: Tuần này tôi ngập việc — thứ Sáu có ba deadline.

vocab.meaning_vi: lấy nhanh, tranh thủ (đồ ăn, đồ uống)
vocab.example: I'm going to grab a coffee. Do you want anything?
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đi lấy cà phê đây. Bạn có muốn gì không?

vocab.example: Are you settling in well at the new office?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn quen với văn phòng mới chưa?

vocab.example: Sorry, I'm running late — start without me.
vocab.example_vi: Xin lỗi, tôi đến muộn — mọi người cứ bắt đầu trước.

vocab.example: Any weekend plans, or just relaxing at home?
vocab.example_vi: Cuối tuần có kế hoạch gì không, hay ở nhà nghỉ ngơi?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Morning, Nam! I'm going to grab a coffee before the nine o'clock meeting. Want one?

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Oh yes, please. How was your commute? The rain was crazy this morning.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Terrible. It took me almost an hour. Anyway, how was your long weekend?

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Really nice. We went to Da Lat with my family. And you?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: I just stayed home. I was swamped with the quarterly report, to be honest.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: That report again? You should ask Minh to help you with the numbers.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Good idea. Oh, it's almost nine — Hoa said she's running late, so we can settle in slowly.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Perfect. Let's catch up more at lunch.

questions.q: Where did Nam go for the long weekend?
Why did Linh stay home at the weekend?
options: She was swamped with a report

questions.q: Who is running late for the meeting?

shadowing: How was your weekend? Did you do anything special?
Sorry I'm running late — please start without me.
I'm a bit swamped this week, can we catch up on Friday?
I'm going to grab a coffee, do you want anything?
It's been a busy morning, but things are settling down now.
